theory_page_present_simple_questions.name: Present Simple: Questions and Short Answers

a1.verb_hint: Wh-question order is question word + do + subject + base verb.
Use does after the question word with he.
Short answer with they uses do.
Short answer with he uses does not.
Question order is Do + subject + adverb + base verb.
Use Does + subject + adverb + base verb.
Team is singular here, so use does.

questions.question: {a1} your sister go during the week
variants: {a1} your sister go during the week

questions.question: Does the train {a1} at this station
variants: Does the train {a1} at this station

a1.verb_hint: Use Do + they + adverb + base verb.
Use Does + she + adverb + base verb.
Correct pattern: Does + subject + base verb.
Short answer with she uses does.
How often + do + subject + base verb.
Use Does + subject + adverb + base verb.
Use Do + subject + adverb + base verb.
Correct pattern: Does + subject + base verb.
Short answer with they uses do not.

questions.question: {a1} the findings justify a broader claim
variants: {a1} the findings justify a broader claim

a1.verb_hint: Wh phrase + does + subject + base verb.
Use Do + subject + adverb + base verb.
Use Does + subject + adverb + base verb.
Correct pattern: Does + subject + base verb.
Short answer with it uses does not.

questions.question: {a1} the data reveal a causal link

a1.verb_hint: Plural data take do in this formal use.

variants: {a1} the data reveal a causal link

questions.question: Does the argument {a1} the main objection
variants: Does the argument {a1} the main objection

questions.question: Does the clause {a1} legal force here
variants: Does the clause {a1} legal force here

a1.verb_hint: Use Do + subject + adverb + base verb.
Use Does + subject + adverb + base verb.
Correct pattern: Does + subject + base verb.
Short answer with it uses does.
